pickle/PickleBuffer/raw.name: raw
pickle/PickleBuffer/raw.description: Return a memoryview of the memory area underlying this buffer. The returned object is a one-dimensional, C-contiguous memoryview with format B (unsigned bytes). BufferError is raised if the buffer is neither C- nor Fortran-contiguous.

pickle/Pickler/reducer_override.name: reducer_override
pickle/Pickler/reducer_override.description: Special reducer that can be defined in Pickler subclasses. This method has priority over any reducer in the dispatch_table. It should conform to the same interface as a __reduce__() method, and can optionally return NotImplemented to fallback on dispatch_table-registered reducers to pickle obj. For a detailed example, see Custom Reduction for Types, Functions, and Other Objects. Added in version 3.8.

pickle/PickleBuffer/release.name: release
pickle/PickleBuffer/release.description: Release the underlying buffer exposed by the PickleBuffer object.

info.excerpt: Release the underlying buffer exposed by the PickleBuffer object.
